---
title: "Paper-and-Pencil Practice Exam: MLEs, Linear Regression, and GLMs"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    output-file: practice-exam-mle-linreg-handout.pdf
---

{{< include shared-config.qmd >}}

These exercises cover maximum likelihood estimation,
Gaussian linear regression,
and generalized linear models.
They are designed for paper-and-pencil practice
(no computer required).

Content is adapted from
[@dobson4e, Chapters 1–6],
[@kleinbaum2014applied, Chapters 4–6],
[@vittinghoff2e, Chapter 4],
and [@dunn2018generalized, Chapters 2–5].

# Part 1: Maximum Likelihood Estimation {#sec-prac-mle}

## Likelihood and log-likelihood

{{< include _subfiles/intro-MLEs/_exr-prac-binom-lik.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/intro-MLEs/_exr-prac-gauss-iid-lik.qmd >}}

---

## Score function properties

{{< include _subfiles/intro-MLEs/_exr-prac-score-zero.qmd >}}

---

## Asymptotic distribution of the MLE

{{< include _subfiles/intro-MLEs/_exr-prac-mle-se.qmd >}}

---

## Exponential MLE

{{< include _subfiles/intro-MLEs/_exr-prac-exp-mle.qmd >}}

---

# Part 2: Gaussian Linear Regression {#sec-prac-linreg}

## Model specification and likelihood

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_exr-prac-linreg-lik.qmd >}}

---

## Deriving the MLE/OLS estimator

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_exr-prac-linreg-score.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_exr-prac-slr-closed-form.qmd >}}

---

## Coefficient interpretation

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_exr-prac-coef-interp.qmd >}}

---

## Goodness of fit

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_exr-prac-r2.qmd >}}

---

# Part 3: Generalized Linear Models {#sec-prac-glm}

## GLM structure

{{< include _subfiles/Intro-to-GLMs/_exr-prac-glm-components.qmd >}}

---

<!-- canonical-link exercise commented out until exponential family / natural parameters are defined
## Link functions and mean-variance relationships

{{< include _subfiles/Intro-to-GLMs/_exr-prac-canonical-link.qmd >}}

---
-->

{{< include _subfiles/count-regression/_exr-prac-glm-interp.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/count-regression/_exr-prac-glm-score.qmd >}}

---

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
